title: Raw Flow cytometry dataset: Optimising Recovery of Hepatic Regulatory T Cells: A Practical Guide Using ARTC2 Blockade
author: Abbott, Caitlin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw flow cytometry files from homeostasis and inflammation experiments +/- ARTC2 reagent  
  fomat:  raw .fcs files 
 Acquired using a 5L Cytek Aurora 
 Files are raw intrahepatic lymphocyte files for analysis of Treg populations in response to treatment with ARTC2 in homeostasis and inflammation. 
 Multiple autofluorescence signatures were removed using Spectroflo software and analysis was performed in Flowjo V10.10 
 Aim: To identify if there are differences in the recovery of activated effector like Treg compared to less activated Treg cells from the liver in homeostasis and inflammation. 
  Exp 1 Groups:  
 Mouse ID numbers: 35, 38, 39 = homeostasis + no treatment 
 Mouse ID numbers: 32, 33, 34 = homeostasis + ARTC2 reagent (50ug/mouse) i.v. 20 min prior to harvest 
 Mouse ID numbers: 51, 52, 62, 63 = inflammation (LPS treatment 1ug/g of mouse) + no further treatment 
 Mouse ID numbers: 48, 49, 50, 60, 61 = inflammation (LPS treatment 1ug/g of mouse) + ARTC2 reagent (50ug/mouse) i.v. 20 min prior to harvest 
  Exp 2 Groups:  
 Mouse ID numbers: 9, 10, 11, 12 = homeostasis + no treatment 
 Mouse ID numbers: 13, 14, 15, 16 = homeostasis + ARTC2 reagent (50ug/mouse) i.v. 20 min prior to harvest 
 Mouse ID numbers: 1, 3, 4 = inflammation (LPS treatment 1ug/g of mouse) + no further treatment 
 Mouse ID numbers: 5, 6, 7, 8 = inflammation (LPS treatment 1ug/g of mouse) + ARTC2 reagent (50ug/mouse) i.v. 20 min prior to harvest
